name: MOPS SDS Running Buffer (NuPAGE)

notes.en: Can be stored as 20× concentrate. Dilute to 1× before use. Optimized for NuPAGE Bis-Tris gels; better resolution for mid-to-high MW proteins (>30 kDa) than MES buffer. Do not adjust pH.
notes.zh: 20× 浓缩液可储存，使用前稀释至 1×。适用于 NuPAGE Bis-Tris 凝胶，分离中-大分子量蛋白 (>30 kDa) 效果优于 MES。不需调 pH。

ref: Invitrogen NuPAGE Technical Guide (Thermo Fisher MAN0003690); Schägger (2006) Nat Protoc 1:16–22
